                     +--------------------------[  Core Logic  ]+
                     |                                          |
+--------------+     |  +-------------+        +-------------+  |     +---------------+
|  Exit Point  |<----o--+  Process B  |<-------+  Process A  |<-o-----+  Entry Point  |
+--------------+     |  +-------------+        +-------------+  |     +---------------+
                     |                                          |
                     |                                          |
                     |                                          |
                     +------------------------------------------+
